ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the county belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the county population */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatalities" (
  "fatality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatality record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where fatalities occurred */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the fatality record */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities recorded in that year */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Primary cause of death */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the fatalities */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the fatalities */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the fatalities */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fatalities_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fatalities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatalities_per_population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the population measure is taken */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population measure */,
  "fatalities_per_100k" REAL /* Number of fatalities per 100,000 population */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the population */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fatalities_per_population_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fatalities_per_population_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yearly_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yearly statistics record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county for the statistics */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "total_fatalities" INTEGER /* Total number of fatalities for the year */,
  "avg_fatalities_per_100k" REAL /* Average fatalities per 100,000 population for the year */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the statistics */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the statistics */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the statistics */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_statistics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_statistics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county associated with the demographics */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of households in the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the population */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the population */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level of the population */,
  "health_insurance_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population with health insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the intervention was implemented */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the intervention was implemented */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of health intervention (e.g., campaign, program) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the intervention */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the intervention */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the intervention */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the intervention in months */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_interventions_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_interventions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting period */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of reporting period (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_periods_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., CDC, State Health Department) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, public health officer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access event */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access event */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
